resources.string: To use this feature, you need to download an algorithm plugin. While it is being downloaded, you can continue using other features.
Downloading algorithm plugin… Try again later.
Headphones connected. Translation results can be played via them.
\"%1$s\" has been disabled. Enable it to view the Privacy Notice.
The selected voice only supports Chinese and English.
The selected voice only supports text in Simplified Chinese and English.

By tapping \"Withdraw and exit\", you will be unable to use this app to translate text, conversations, or photos and we will stop collecting and using any personal information necessary to provide the functions. Withdrawal of consent will not affect the validity of any personal information processing based on consent before its withdrawal. You can revoke your permissions for this app in Permission manager.\nFor details, refer to the %1$s.
Attend meetings and watch videos with real-time bilingual captions.
Try live bilingual captions for videos and online meetings to follow along effortlessly.
Tap the mic to start speaking
\"Access count\" and \"Personal information to be collected\" don\'t contain data that was generated today.
Generated by NEXT AI. For reference only.
Generated by OPPO AI. For reference only.
This item will be permanently deleted from your translation history.
Tap the mic at the bottom and start speaking
Display translations for different languages on both screens to make it easier for both parties to communicate. The screens will enter Dark mode for extended periods of usage.
Display translations for each language on each screen to make it easier for both parties to communicate. The screens will enter Dark mode to extend battery life.

Display translations for each language on each screen to make it easier for both parties to communicate. The microphone will keep picking up sound after being turned on to ensure continuous communication. The screens will enter Dark mode to extend battery life.
%1$s is displayed on the main screen, and %2$s is displayed on the cover screen
Translation will also be displayed on the cover screen.
Fold your device at an angle for Dual screen.
Fold your device at an angle for Dual screen.
After this pack is deleted, you will no longer be able to translate text between this language pair while offline.
To translate text offline after the update, download the latest offline pack.
Download language packs for offline translation.
The %1$s offline pack has not been downloaded. Please connect to the internet and download it in the Translate app.
Headphones connected. You will hear the translations in real time.
You are currently using a mobile network. Continue downloading?
Fullscreen display is not supported in Split View
Overcome language barriers effortlessly with precise speech recognition and translation. Both text and conversations are supported.
Multiple languages are supported, including Chinese, English, Japanese, and Korean.
Instant voice translation allows for smooth, natural conversations between different language speakers.
No internet. You can download offline packs in settings.
Your history will be permanently deleted.
Delete this item from your translation history?
A call session is in progress. Try again later.
Screen translate unavailable in landscape mode
The microphone will keep picking up sound after you\'ve turned it on.
Internet connection failed. Please try again.
No speech recognised. Please try again.
\"Voice Translate\" requires the \"Microphone\" permission to transcribe speech into text and translate it into a desired language.
\"Translate\" requires the \"Microphone\" permission to record system sound and microphone sound.
\"Translate\" needs to write to the clipboard to provide functions such as copy and paste.
\"Translate\" requires the \"Notifications\" permission to notify you of in-app events and services.
What you say will be translated and displayed on the other user\'s screen
Failed to download the plugin. Please try again.

4.2 Subject to relevant requirements in your country or region, during your use of the Service and/or related GenAI Services, we will inform you when AI is being used to generate content and label AI-generated content as such, either by text watermark, general symbols, voice or other means. When you publish or disseminate content that was generated relying on the Service or when you use such content elsewhere other than in the Service, you must indicate the content as AI-generated in a timely manner. Without our consent or a lawful and legitimate basis, you may not remove, tamper with, forge, conceal or modify in a misleading manner any form of identification that is embedded in the Service.

4.3 Subject to relevant requirements in your country or region, during your use of the Service and/or related GenAI services and for the purpose of fulfilling our obligation to comply with legal requirements, we may review your behaviour and information related to your use of the Service manually or through technical means, including, but not limited to, input and output review and the establishment of risk filtering mechanisms and a database of illegal content features. If we find any potential breach of this Agreement, laws or regulations in your usage, we have the right to determine the severity of your behaviour and the applicable rules and take action accordingly, such as suspending or stopping the provision of related services to you.

4.4 You may not change, reproduce, extract, modify, alter or add to the Service or all types of content made available through the Service including, but not limited to, text, videos, audio, images, icons, apps, designs, software, scripts, programs, copyrights, trademarks, trade names, logos and analogous material and services, including their appearance (collectively, \"Our Content\"), nor may you sell, copy, disseminate, license or misuse Our Content. If you need to repost, extract, reproduce, disseminate or otherwise use any of Service Content, you must contact us in advance to obtain our prior written consent, except as otherwise expressly stated in this Agreement. This shall not have the effect of limiting your rights under any mandatory provisions.

4.5 You own legal rights to the text, files, images, pictures or other information (collectively, \"User Content\") that you upload, publish and otherwise transmit to or through the Service and are solely responsible for such User Content. You understand and undertake that, during your use of the Service, the content you input and that which is generated for you, as well as the AI-generated content that you disseminate, does not infringe upon the legal rights of any other person, including their IPRs or their rights to portrait, reputation, honour, name, privacy and personal information. Additionally, you acknowledge that you own the IPRs to such content or you have legally obtained the authorisation of the right holders. Otherwise, you will bear the risks and liabilities of infringement arising therefrom and be liable for all direct and indirect losses incurred by us (including but not limited to financial losses, damages to goodwill, rights protection expenses and lawyer\'s fees).

4.6 We reserve the right, at any time and at our sole discretion, to limit the availability of the Service or any part thereof to any individual or region and to limit the amount of content, programs, products, services or other features provided through the Service.

You agree to protect and safeguard the Service as well as our interests and those of other users and to be liable for any damages caused to the Service, us, or any other third party as a result of your violation of applicable laws, regulations, or any term of this Agreement.

11.1 This Agreement is governed by the laws of the People\'s Republic of China (excluding the laws of Hong Kong SAR, Macao SAR, and Taiwan), except as otherwise specified by any mandatory applicable laws in your jurisdiction, in which case all or certain rights and obligations of both parties will be governed by the laws of your usual place of residence.

11.2 To the extent permitted by applicable law, you and we should first turn to friendly consultation to resolve any dispute or issue in relation to the Service arising out of this Agreement. If no resolution can be reached within 30 days of the date a dispute is raised, either party has the right to submit the dispute (which may be either contractual or non-contractual) to the Dongguan No. 2 People\'s Court in Guangdong Province of China for resolution, with the only exception that if mandatory laws and courts in your country or region provide you with an inalienable right to submit the dispute to your local jurisdiction, or if the courts in your country or region consider this to be unfair, the dispute will be submitted to the courts of your usual place of residence. This does not affect your right to sue to protect your legitimate rights.

12.1 To better improve the user experience and our services, we will continue to optimise the Service. We may add or delete features to or from the Service, impose new restrictions on the use of the Service, or suspend or terminate parts of the Service. We may also revise this Agreement based on updates to the Service. We will inform you within a reasonable time period in advance of any changes to the Service or this Agreement that may materially disadvantage our users or materially limit the access or usage of the Service. Regarding changes to the Service that we need to make for compliance with security, safety, legal, or regulatory requirements, we may not be able to meet the aforementioned time limit and we will update you on such changes as soon as is feasible.

12.2 If any term in this Agreement is held by a court with appropriate jurisdiction or any other competent authority to be invalid, void, or unenforceable, then that term is deemed to have been removed from this Agreement, but the remaining terms of this Agreement remain in full force and effect.
12.3 We reserve the right to transfer, assign, subcontract, or alter our rights and obligations under this Agreement.
1.1 Translate provides translation services for text, conversations and images.

(1) The text translation feature translates the text you input across languages. It also supports voice input. When you use the text translation feature, the App will obtain the text you input and leverage server-based or on-device translation capabilities to perform the translation.

(2) The conversation translation and real-time interpretation features translate the audio you input across languages. When you use the two features, the App needs to collect your audio input to transcribe it, and then leverage server-based or on-device translation capabilities to perform the translation. It may also generate AI content based on the translation to help you quickly organise your content.

(3) The image translation feature extracts text from onscreen images and translates it across languages. When you use the image translation feature, the App captures image information and leverages server-based or on-device translation capabilities to perform the translation. It may also generate smart content based on the translation to help you quickly understand the captured content.

1.2 Subject to the laws in your country or region, you may need to create and sign in to a HeyTap Account to use the Service. The use of your account must comply with the applicable user agreements and terms of service. You understand and agree that you should keep your HeyTap Account information and password safe and will be legally responsible for the acts associated with your HeyTap Account and password.

1.3 The text translation, voice translation and image translation features rely on generative artificial intelligence (GenAI) technology to provide smart content generation for you. Content generated by the Service is for reference only and should not be considered professional advice or used for commercial or other purposes. If the content pertains to matters that may significantly impact you or others (such as medical, financial, investment or insurance issues), you should consult the appropriate professionals. Content generated by the Service should not be relied upon as a basis for action or inaction. You will bear the responsibilities and consequences arising from any judgement you make based on such output or from your subsequent actions based thereupon, including the risks arising from your reliance on the authenticity, accuracy, reliability, non-infringement or fitness for a particular purpose of the content. Please use the Service in a reasonable manner and in accordance with the law. We fully understand the importance of protecting minors, and we take appropriate protective measures in accordance with the requirements of laws and regulations and the mainstream practices of the industry. At the same time, guardians should guide and restrain the use of the Service by minors, contribute to the creation of a healthy online environment, help minors develop good online habits, and avoid excessive dependence on or addiction to the Service.

1.4 We will continue to expand and improve the Service and its features, which may vary depending on the device and operating system you use, the region you are located in or the changing requirements of applicable laws. The availability of the features is subject to the Service actually provided to you.
2.1 We grant you a personal, non-transferable, non-sublicensable, revocable, and non-exclusive licence to use the Service for non-commercial purposes under this Agreement.

2.2 The Service may incorporate third-party open-source software. The rights and obligations relating to such open-source software are subject to the related software licence agreements or open-source agreements. When using such open-source software, you must also comply with the requirements of the third-party software licence agreements or open-source agreements. Should any term of this Agreement conflict with any provisions within the third-party software licence agreements or open-source agreements, the third-party software licence agreements or open-source agreements shall prevail.

3.1 You understand and agree that you may use services provided by third parties (\"Third-Party Services\") within the Service. You agree that you will separately enter into a contract (\"Third-Party Agreement\") with such third parties regarding the third-party services you use. We are not a party to a Third-Party Agreement entered into between you and a third-party service provider. We strongly recommend that you carefully read the Third-Party Agreement and privacy policy of such a third party.

3.2 We have no right or obligation to control or review the products or services provided by a third party and are not liable for any infringement of your rights as a result of your use of such third-party products or services. We are not responsible for the content or availability of any third-party products or services, nor do we make any warranties of any kind regarding any content, advertising, products, services, or other information provided by any third party in the Service.

3.3 Any disputes arising from your downloading or use of any third-party products or services through the Service need to be resolved by the third-party service provider concerned, and we are not responsible or liable for such disputes. We do not provide any technical or customer support for any third-party service. If you need support, please contact the third-party service provider.

4.1 You must comply with the relevant laws and regulations when using the Service and shall not use the Service to commit any illegal acts or acts expressly prohibited by this Agreement, including but not limited to:

(1) Posting, transmitting, disseminating, or storing any content that endangers national security or unity, undermines social stability, or goes against public order or good morals, or any insulting, defamatory, obscene, or violent content, or any content that violates national laws or regulations;
(10) Using any plugins, add-ons, systems, or third-party tools that are not authorised or licensed by us to interfere with, disrupt, modify, or otherwise affect the normal functioning of the Service;
(11) Creating an account to use the Service by unauthorised means, including but not limited to the use of automated devices, scripts, bots, web crawlers, or plagiarised programs;
(12) Attempting to restrict other users from using or enjoying the Service, or encouraging or facilitating any behaviour that violates this Agreement or other terms or conditions published by us;
(13) Using any domain name or website URL in your account without our prior written permission;

(14) Interfering with or disrupting our servers or networks or any other server or network connected to the Service by any means, such as spreading worms, viruses, spyware, malware, or other destructive code;

(15) Damaging, disabling, diminishing, or endangering the Service or the end system or its security, overloading the system, interfering with the end system of any individual or any other party, or invading or gaining unauthorised access to the Service or our data;
(16) Reverse engineering, disassembling, or decompiling the software contained in or relating to the Service, or otherwise attempting to discover the source code of such software;

(17) Submitting or otherwise providing the Service, either wholly or partially (including the subject matter of the licence and source code), in any way to any other person without our prior written permission;

(18) Reproducing or modifying the Service, either wholly or partially, without our prior written permission, or merging or incorporating the Service or any part thereof with or into any other program;
(19) Using the Service for commercial purposes without our prior written permission;
(2) Posting, transmitting, disseminating, or storing any content that infringes upon the legal rights of others, such as intellectual property rights and trade secrets;
(20) Entering improper information to induce the Service to produce content that violates relevant laws and regulations;

(21) Attempting, either through or by using the Service, to generate, create or share content that could harass, bully, abuse, threaten or intimidate other individuals, or otherwise cause harm to individuals, organisations or society;
(22) Attempting to generate, create or share content that may violate the privacy of others (including revealing private information);

(23) Engaging in, either through or by using the Service, fraudulent, fake or misleading activity, or attempting to, either through or by using the Service, generate, create or share content that may mislead or deceive others, such as creating false information, fraudulent content or impersonating others;

(24) Using the Service to generate, create or share inappropriate content or materials, using the Service to create or share adult content, violent or gory content, content that promotes hatred, terrorism, extremism or violence, material depicting child sexual exploitation or abuse, or other content that is disturbing or offensive;
(25) Committing any other acts that violate laws or regulations, this Agreement or other related rules published by us or that infringe upon the legal rights of others.

(3) Posting any pictures or other content that promotes violence, nudity, partial nudity, discrimination, violation of laws, or infringement, or any disgusting, pornographic, or sexually suggestive pictures or other similar content;

(4) Defaming, coercing, bullying, abusing, harassing, threatening, impersonating, or intimidating other persons or entities, or using the Service to post private or confidential information of any other person, including but not limited to their ID card number, bank card number, passport number, home address, non-public telephone number, or non-public email address;
(5) Asking for the accounts and passwords of another person or accessing their accounts to engage in money laundering, cash-out schemes, or pyramid selling;

(6) Altering, modifying, adapting, or changing the Service, or altering, modifying, or changing other websites so as to mislead others into believing that such websites are affiliated with the Service;

(7) Adding, deleting, or changing the features of the Service and its related software or changing the performance of the features by modifying or falsifying instructions or data within the Service and its related software, which includes operating or disseminating the software and methods used for the aforementioned purposes, regardless of whether this act is for commercial purposes or not;

(8) Copying, modifying, adding, deleting, creating links to, or posting on any third-party websites, as well as creating derivative works based on any data released to the memory of the hosting device of any kind during the running of the Service, the client-server interaction data generated during the running of the Service, or system data needed to run the Service by using methods, including but not limited to plugins, add-ons, or unauthorised third-party tools/services to access the Service and/or related systems;
(9) Accessing our cryptographic application programming interfaces (\"APIs\") by means other than those permitted by us (the use of such APIs must comply with our regulations);

4.2 You understand and agree that, subject to relevant requirements in your country or region, explicit and implicit labels may be added to the user interface or the generated content during your use of the Service and/or related GenAI services, where explicit labels may be presented in the form of text watermarks, common symbols or audio, and can be clearly perceived by users; and implicit labels are added to the metadata of AI-generated content through technical measures and are not easily perceptible to users. In certain situations, to fulfil legal obligations, we have the right to add explicit labels to AI-generated content that you download, copy or export. Without lawful and legitimate grounds, you must not maliciously delete, alter, forge or conceal the aforementioned labels of the AI-generated content; you must not provide tools or services for others to carry out similar malicious acts; and you must not, through improper content labels, infringe upon our or others\' legal rights and interests.

4.3 You understand and agree that, subject to relevant requirements in your country or region, you may need to add conspicuous labels (including notifications, explanations or markings) to content generated using deep learning, virtual reality, generative AI or other new technologies when you publish or disseminate such content. This is to avoid misleading or confusing users, or causing misidentification of the content. You are solely responsible for any consequences or liabilities arising from your failure to provide such necessary labelling or notice.

4.4 Subject to relevant requirements in your country or region, when you use this Service and/or its corresponding generative AI services, we may implement technical or manual measures to review your usage of the Service and the information involved, in order to fulfil legal compliance requirements. This may include, but is not limited to, reviewing inputs and outputs, establishing risk filtering mechanisms and creating databases of characteristics of illegal content. If your usage is deemed to potentially violate this Agreement or applicable laws and regulations, we reserve the right to assess your conduct and the applicable rules and to take action accordingly, including suspending or terminating the provision of relevant services.

4.5 You may not change, reproduce, extract, modify, alter or add to the Service or Our Content (see Section 5.1 for this concept) contained therein in any way, nor may you sell, copy, disseminate, license or misuse Our Content. If you need to repost, extract, reproduce, disseminate or otherwise use any of Service Content, you must contact us in advance to obtain our prior written consent, except as otherwise expressly stated in this Agreement. This will not have the effect of limiting your rights under any mandatory provisions.

4.6 You own legal rights to the text, files, images, pictures or other information (collectively, \"User Content\") that you upload, publish and otherwise transmit to or through the Service and are solely responsible for such User Content. You understand and undertake that, during your use of the Service, the content you input and that which is generated for you, as well as the AI-generated content that you disseminate, does not infringe upon the legal rights of any other person, including their IPRs or their rights to portrait, reputation, honour, name, privacy and personal information. Additionally, you acknowledge that you own the IPRs to such content or you have legally obtained the authorisation of the right holders. Otherwise, you will bear the risks and liabilities of infringement arising therefrom and be liable for all direct and indirect losses incurred by us (including but not limited to financial losses, damages to goodwill, rights protection expenses and lawyer\'s fees).

4.7 We reserve the right, at any time and at our sole discretion, to limit the availability of the Service or any part thereof to any individual or territory and to limit the amount of content, programs, products, services or other features provided through the Service.
5. Intellectual Property Rights and Other Rights

5.1 Unless otherwise provided by laws and regulations or otherwise agreed between you and us, we reserve all rights to all types of content made available through the Service, including, but not limited to, text, videos, audio, images, icons, apps, designs, software, scripts, programs, copyrights, trademarks, trade names, logos, and analogous material and services, including their appearance (collectively, \"Our Content\"). Unless otherwise stated in this Agreement, your access to and/or use of the Service does not constitute the transfer of any ownership or other rights concerning the Service or Our Content contained therein to you or any other party.

5.2 During your use of the Service, if you discover any infringement of your legal rights, you have the right to ask us to take necessary measures to handle the infringement. To the extent permitted by laws and regulations, you agree that we have the authorisation to take any legal action, including but not limited to filing a complaint or lawsuit, against any act that infringes upon your legal rights (including but not limited to unauthorised copying, use, editing or plagiarising). We also attach great importance to the quality of content in the Service, and we will strive to take reasonable security measures to filter out inappropriate content. If you find that the content produced by the Service is improper, contains any illegal or false information, or constitutes a violation of this Agreement, you can contact us as set forth in \"Contact Us\" of this Privacy Notice.

6.1 To improve the user experience and our services or to ensure the functional consistency and security of the Service, we may provide software updates (including but not limited to software modifications, upgrades, enhancements, new service offerings or new releases) to the Service from time to time. %1$s
You acknowledge and agree that to ensure the security of the Service, we reserve the right to perform the aforementioned software updates to the Service without prior notice.

After a new software version is released for the Service, the older version or some features of the older version may be rendered unusable. We make no guarantee or undertaking that the older version will continue to function properly or that you will continue to receive relevant services for the older version. Please keep abreast of any updates and ensure that you have the latest version installed.

Protecting the personal information of users is a basic principle that we uphold. In addition, to provide you with more stable services and enhance the security of your transactions, we may collect and process your personal information in accordance with the %1$s.

8.1 We will make every endeavour to provide you with uninterrupted and secure services. However, you understand that the Service may be interrupted, delayed, or interfered with for an indeterminate amount of time due to factors beyond our control. You agree that we are not liable for any losses caused by or arising from any such delay, interruption, interference, or analogous failure.
8.2 To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, we are not liable to you or anyone else for any damages caused by failing to access or use the Service due to:
(1) Any suspension or termination of the Service resulting from the maintenance or upgrade of our system, software, or hardware;
(2) Any delay or failure of a related system or network that is not owned or controlled by us;
(3) Any suspension, cancellation, or termination of any agreement or other arrangements between us and any third-party payment service provider;
(4) Errors or interruptions of the Service caused by hacker attacks or similar security breaches; or
(5) Any other reason beyond our reasonable control.

8.3 The Service is provided on an \"as is\" and \"as available\" basis without any warranty or endorsement of any kind. To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, we disclaim all warranties, conditions, or other terms of any kind, whether express or implied, and make no guarantee, undertaking, representation, or warranty with respect to:
(1) The timeliness, reliability, accuracy, or completeness of the Service or information made available through the Service;
(2) The possibility that the Service or the server hosting the Service contains defects, viruses, bugs, or any other harmful elements;
(3) The availability of the features of the Service or the reliability, quality, or accuracy of any information obtained by you as a result of your use of or access to the Service;
(4) The reliability, quality, accuracy, or availability of the Service, or its ability to meet your needs or generate or deliver the required results or outcomes;
(5) The prevention of errors that could occur when you delete or store data during your use of the Service.

8.4 We are not responsible or liable for any loss or damage caused by relying upon (whether in whole or in part), using, or interpreting the Service or other information obtained through your (or any other person\'s) use of the Service.
8.5 We are not responsible for any failure or delay in the performance of this Agreement or any obligations under this Agreement arising out of or caused by events beyond our reasonable control.

8.6 The Service is only for your sole use and does not apply to any third party. You agree that we and our affiliates, officers, directors, employees, contractors, agents, third-party payment service providers, partners, licensors, and distributors are not liable for any loss caused by any unauthorised use of the Service.

8.7 The laws of some countries do not permit the exclusion or limitation of certain warranties, guarantees, or liabilities. If such laws apply to you, then some or all of the above exclusions or limitations may not apply to you. Nothing in this Agreement affects the statutory rights that you are entitled to as a consumer, nor does it affect the rights that you cannot contractually agree to alter or waive.

8.8 You agree that should you suffer any damages, losses, or injuries stemming from our acts or oversights, the damages incurred by you are not irreparable or substantial enough to warrant an injunction preventing the exploitation of any websites, property, products, services, or other content owned or controlled by us. Moreover, you relinquish any rights to enjoin or restrain the development, production, distribution, advertising, exhibition, or exploitation of any websites, property, products, services, or other content owned or controlled by us.
9. Modification, Suspension, and Termination of Service

9.1 Subject to applicable laws, we may temporarily or permanently suspend, cancel, or restrict your access to the Service in whole or in part at any time, without assuming liability to any individual or third party. We will endeavour to provide notice to you before we do this. However, we may not provide prior notice to you, and may permanently or temporarily restrict, cancel, or terminate your access to the Service in whole or in part upon the following conditions:
(1) You violate, or we have reasons to believe that you are going to violate this Agreement, including any provisions, policies, or guidelines contained therein;
(2) You, or anyone acting on your behalf, acts fraudulently or illegally or provides us with false or misleading information;
(3) We respond to requests from law enforcement authorities or government agencies in accordance with effective legal procedures;
(4) We carry out urgent maintenance work or updates to systems or hardware;
(5) We encounter unforeseen technological, security, or business issues.
9.2 You can terminate this Agreement by ceasing to use the Service.

9.3 The expiration or termination of this Agreement does not affect the provisions contained herein that are expressly stated to remain enforceable or effective after its invalidation or termination, nor will it affect any accrued rights or obligations or any rights or obligations that survive the invalidation or termination of this Agreement.

9.4 Any provisions in this Agreement that expressly survive the termination of this Agreement or are inherently applicable shall remain in full force and effect subsequent to its termination until they are fulfilled or naturally expire.

Before using the Service, please carefully read and fully understand the clauses of this Agreement, especially those relating to the exclusion or limitation of liability, licensing of rights and use of information, and governing law and dispute resolution. The limitation or exclusion of liability clauses are highlighted in bold or underlined for your special attention.

Please do not download, install, or use the Service unless you have carefully read, fully understood, and agreed to all the terms of this Agreement. By tapping \"Agree\" or \"Next\", or by downloading, installing, using, or signing in to the Service, or by either explicitly or implicitly accepting this Agreement, you will be deemed to have read and agreed to be bound by this Agreement. This Agreement is a binding legal contract between you and us.

To sign this Agreement and use the Service, you must have reached the legal age of majority in your country or region of residence. If you are under the legal age of majority, before you decide whether to use the Service, please read this Agreement with your parent or guardian to make sure that they clearly understand the content of this Agreement. Do not use the Service before obtaining their consent.
If you are a user outside the Chinese mainland, you must also comply with the laws of your country or region of residence when signing or performing this Agreement and using the Service.
If you have any questions regarding this Agreement, the Service or related features, you can go to %1$s to contact us.

This Agreement is entered into by and between you and OnePlus Technology (Shenzhen) Co., Ltd. and its affiliates (collectively, \"we\", \"us\" or \"our\") and governs your use of Translate (the \"Service\"). This Agreement explains how we provide the Service to you, what activities are permitted or prohibited on or in connection with the Service, the measures we will take to respond to relevant issues, and other important matters. %1$s
If you have any questions regarding this Agreement, the Service or related features, you can go to %1$s to contact us.

This Agreement is entered into by and between you and Guangdong OPPO Mobile Telecommunications Corp., Ltd. and its affiliates (collectively, \"we\", \"us\" or \"our\") and governs your use of Translate (the \"Service\"). This Agreement explains how we provide the Service to you, what activities are permitted or prohibited on or in connection with the Service, the measures we will take to respond to relevant issues, and other important matters. %1$s
If you have any questions regarding this Agreement, the Service or related features, you can call the 95018 hotline or go to %1$s to contact us.
If you have any questions regarding this Agreement, the Service or related features, you can go to %1$s to contact us.

This Agreement is entered into by and between you and Realme Chongqing Mobile Telecommunications Corp., Ltd. and its affiliates (collectively, \"we\", \"us\" or \"our\") and governs your use of Translate (the \"Service\"). This Agreement explains how we provide the Service to you, what activities are permitted or prohibited on or in connection with the Service, the measures we will take to respond to relevant issues, and other important matters. %1$s
Your translation history will be permanently deleted from this device.
No text detected. Try selecting again.
Translation not supported for this content
Fullscreen translate not supported in this app
Tap outside the frame to cancel
Drag and adjust the frame to select an area for translation.
Circle or paint over content to translate
Screen content will be translated in real time. Multiple languages are supported.
Screen translation lets you read foreign languages as easily as your native tongue, with screen content translated in real time.
Browse pages in your native language as screen content is translated in real time.

To provide the screen translation service, this app needs to connect to the internet to translate text in images. By tapping \"Agree and continue\", you agree to the Statement of Use and turn on this service. If you tap \"Disagree\", you will be unable to use this service.
Screenshots restricted for privacy and copyright
Tap the mic to start translating
Tap the mic at the bottom to start
Voice is being translated in real time. Tap to view details.
Hold the microphone closer to you
Sound too low. Try to speak louder.
Personal information the third party collects: %1$s
Personal Information We Share with Third Parties
Link to the third party\'s privacy policy: %1$s
Tap or hold the mic at the bottom to talk
Tap or hold the mic to talk
Continuous translation on. The microphone will keep picking up sound.
Dual screen on. The microphone will keep picking up sound.
The audio is longer than 60 seconds and cannot be recognised
